---
title: "About"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808
---

::: {.callout-note}
Draft. Replace this with your own bio before publishing.
:::

I'm Prerna Tyagi. Data scientist moving into applied AI/ML engineering.

Each post on this site is paired with a from-scratch implementation in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth) and an assignment notebook so a reader can build the same thing themselves before reading the worked version. Inspired by [Tanul Singh's gradient-descent-through-transformers series](https://tanulsingh.github.io/blog).

My main shipped product is **Pragya Nursery** — a real ordering platform I built for my father's nursery in Greater Noida.
